mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(status), ''), '未设置') AS name, COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM project_topic WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(status), ''), '未设置')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total FROM project_topic WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total FROM project_selection WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT t.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_name AS topicName, t.academic_year AS academicYear, t.status AS status, u.real_name AS teacherName FROM project_topic t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.teacher_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
